matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Social Anthropology is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The Cambridge MPhil by advanced study in Social Anthropology is an intensive 11-month course (early October to end August). The course is academically challenging and is intended for postgraduate students who are studying the subject for the first time, who have studied Anthropology in the context of a more general degree, and/or for those with little knowledge of the tradition of British Social Anthropology.
